name: DC Hub Nexus
description: Data Center Intelligence Platform – Access 50,000+ global data center facilities, real-time market intelligence, M&A transactions, news, and infrastructure data via MCP.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search 50,000+ global data center facilities by location, provider, or keyword.

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific data center facility.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List data center M&A transactions with deal values and details.

tools.name: get_market_intel
tools.description: Get data center market intelligence and statistics.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get latest data center industry news aggregated from 40+ sources.

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Evaluate a location for data center suitability using DC Hub's scoring engine.

authentication.note: Free tier requires no authentication. API keys optional for higher rate limits.
